MIGRATE-ALL.summary: Orchestrator side: dispatch RDMA MIGRATE to N peer donors (self + each peer-host:port) in parallel and register an aggregated orchestration record. Each peer donor calls back via RDMA MIGRATE-COMPLETE when its worker enters DONE/FAILED. Returns +OK orchestration_id=<N> running immediately; poll RDMA MIGRATE-ALL-STATUS for progress.
MIGRATE-ALL.complexity: O(N) in number of peer donors (one TCP dispatch each at command time).
